verses.text: Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ka ten'na ka leitung pumpi uh a sih ciangin mihingte bawl a hilo, Pasian in a kip tawntung dingin kote-a' dingin a hong bawlsak inn, vantungah a neiding ka hihna uh ka thei uh hi
Tu laitakin ka vantung inn uhah ka omnopna uh lianlua mahmah ahih manin ngaklahin ka khuisasa uh hi
Vantung inn-ah ka om uh ciangin pumpi neiloin guak om ding ka hi kei uh hi

Hih leitung pumpi tawh ka om uh laitakin lungkhamin ka khuisasa uh hi. Hih ka leitung pumpi uh ka nusiat nopna hang uh hiloin a sithei pumpi pen a sithei nawnlo pumpi tawh a kilaih theihna dingin ka vantung pumpi uh ka deihna hang uh ahi hi
Hih kikheelna ding a hong vaihawmsakpa pen Pasian hi a, kote a hong piakdingte khempeuh hong pia taktak ding cih a lahna-in kote tungah ama Kha Siangtho a hong pia hi
Tua ahih manin lungmuang takin ka om tawntung uh hi. Hih ka leitung pumpi uhah ka om laiteng uh Topa' hong piakding pumpi tawh a omkhawm nailo ka hi uh hi
Muhna hang tawh lungmuangin a om hiloin upna hang tawh lungmuang takin a om ka hi uh hi
Lungmuang takin a ki-om hithiat hi a, hih leitung pumpi nusia-in Topa tawh omkhawm ding a ki-utzaw ahi hi
Tua ahih manin hih lai inn-ah a ki-om ahi a, hua lai vantung inn-ah a ki-om ahi zongin thudang khempeuh sangin Topa lungdamsak ding ngaihsutpi-in a kinei ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih mai-ah thusitna a thuakdingin eite khempeuh a kilak ding ihi a, leitung i pumpi-in i omlai-in i gamtatna tawh kizui-in eite tawh a kituak ciatin a sia ahi a, a pha ahi zongin a ngah ciat ding ihi hi.

Pasian zahtakna ding thu ka lungsim uhah om tawntung ahih manin mite ka zolzawhna dingun ka hanciam uh hi. Pasian in kote' lungsim teltakin hong thei a, note in zong na lungsim uhah kei hong thei dingin ka hong um hi

Note in na hong thupi ngaihsut theihna dingun koleko a hong kiphattawm zel ka hi kei uh a, lungsimtawng hoihlo napi-in a puatham siamna hangin a kisial mite nial thei-in, kote' hangin note na kisaktheihna ding uh deihna hizaw hi
Mihai ka hih uh leh zong Pasian' minthan'na ding hi a, mipil ka hih uh leh zong note' phattuamna ding mah hi veve hi
Mi khempeuh-a' dingin mi khat si khin ahih manin mi khempeuh zong a ngeina lui uhah si khinta hi, ci-in ka theihna hangun tua Khrih' itna in kote' nuntakna hong uk hi
Ama hangin a nungtate, amau-a' dingin nungta nawnloin, amau' hangin si-in a kihingkik sakpa-a' dingin a nuntak theihna dingun mi khempeuh-a' dingin amah a hong si hi
Tua ahih manin kote in mihingte' ngeina zia tawh kuamah ka en nawn kei uh hi. Khrih mahmah zong mihing lungsim ngaihsutna zia tawh ka et ngei uh hangin tu-in tua bangin ka ngaihsun nawn kei uh hi
Tua ahih manin mi khatpeuh, Khrih tawh a kipawl ciangin mi thak suak a, a mi lui ngeina bei-in a mi thak ngeina a neita ahi hi
Hih thu khempeuh Pasian' vaihawm hi a, eite pen Pasian' gal hinapi-in Khrih hangin amah tawh a kilem mi hong hisak a, kote tungah tua kilemna ding nasep hong pia hi
Tua ahih manin kote' thugen bulpi in: Pasian in mite' mawhnate ngaihsun nawnloin, Khrih hangin leitung mi khempeuh leh amah a kilemin hong bawl a, tua kilemna thu a gen dingin kote hong seh hi
Tua ahih ciangin kote pen Khrih tangin nasem ka hi uh a, Pasian in kote zangin note tungah thu a hong gen ahi hi. Pasian tawh kilemin pawlkhatin na omna dingun Khrih tangin a hong thum ka hi uh hi
Khrih tawh i kipawlna hangin eite zong Pasian tawh a kibangin midik i suahtheihna dingin mawhna a neilo Khrih pen eite' tangdingin Pasian in mawhnei mi a suaksak hi.
